![Portrait of Oluwaseyi Oso](https://thelastgate.org/assets/team/oluwaseyi-oso.jpg)

## Oluwaseyi Oso

Creative Director

Scriptwriter, narrator, visual engineer, videographer, researcher.

![Portrait of Oluwaseun Oso](https://thelastgate.org/assets/team/Oluwaseun-oso.jpeg)

## Oluwaseun Oso

Technical Director

Web developer, video editor, co-scriptwriter; built the prisoner's dilemma simulation and Bot Tube interface.

## About Us

**Oluwaseyi Oso** is a Nigerian writer, poet, singer-songwriter, researcher, and AI safety enthusiast. His writings have appeared in The Nation, The Cable, Where the Leaves Fall, Lagos Review, and other publications. He holds a BA and an MA in English from the University of Lagos, Nigeria.

**Oluwaseun Oso** is a writer, poet, web developer, and AI safety enthusiast. He holds a BSc in Mass Communication from Bamidele Olumilua University of Education, Science, and Technology, and is currently a Law student at the University of Lagos.

## Our Roles

- **Oluwaseyi Oso (Creative Director)** — Scriptwriter, Narrator, Visual Engineer, Videographer, Researcher
- **Oluwaseun Oso (Technical Director)** — Web Developer (developed the prisoner's dilemma simulation and the Bot Tube interface), Video Editor, Co-scriptwriter
